subcodes.title: Words to Dr. Coles and Archdeacon Dowling, spoken on 1914-01-01
subcodes.first_line: Imagine a little lamb surrounded by a hundred thousand wolves, threatening to tear it to pieces at every moment. Were it not for the eternal vigilance of the Divine Powers, man could not live for one second.
subcodes.subjects: @angels, @the concourse on high, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
